Fundraising for Candy Shops

• Built directly into your Shopify store

• Setup in minutes with zero code

• Reach new customers through your community

• Track every sale by campaign and participant

Add to your Store

Built into Shopify

Fundlet runs entirely inside your existing Shopify store. No separate platform, no extra logins — your fundraiser lives where your products already are.

  • • Installs in one click from the Shopify App Store
  • • Uses your existing products and collections
  • • Works with any Shopify theme

THIS IS THE BEST!!! Mathew is SUPER responsive! We launched our initiative and raised over $11,000 in less than a week! It works great, highly customizable. Self contained in house fundraising has never been easier. Especially if you are a shop and need to host multiple fundraisers.

– Popus Gourmet Popcorn

Simple Onboarding

Get campaigns and participants set up fast with built-in onboarding forms — no manual spreadsheets or external tools required.

  • • Add campaigns directly from your Shopify homepage
  • • Share a single link to onboard participants
  • • Works on any device

Sales Tracking

Know exactly how your fundraiser is performing with per-campaign and per-participant reporting built into your Shopify admin.

  • • Dashboard to track progress toward goals
  • • Track sales down to the individual participant
  • • Exportable reports

🌱 Built for Shopify Merchants — Install Fundlet and start your first fundraiser today.

Candy and confectionery products are fundraising staples — easy to sell, easy to ship, and always popular. With Fundlet, your candy shop can run professional fundraising campaigns for schools, youth sports leagues, church groups, and community organizations, all through your existing Shopify store.

Ditch the Paper Order Forms

Old-fashioned candy fundraisers rely on paper forms and manual collection. Participants carry a sheet from door to door, collect cash, and return the form to an organizer who tallies it by hand. Fundlet eliminates that entire process:

  • Each participant gets a unique link to share online
  • Supporters order directly from your Shopify store
  • Orders are automatically tagged by campaign and participant
  • You see real-time progress in your Fundlet dashboard

A Real Review from a Candy Shop

"I searched high and low for an app to allow fundraising for my candy site, and this was exactly what I was looking for! Matthew (the developer) answered all my questions right away, and even did some custom dev work to get it to work how I was wanting. Highly recommend this app!"

— UpTop Treats

Customize Your Fundraising Products

Fundlet lets you create campaigns around specific product collections. Feature your best-selling boxes, seasonal assortments, or custom bundles — and give each campaign its own goal, photo, and landing page.

Install Fundlet on Shopify and launch your first candy fundraiser in minutes.

See also: Fundraising for Small Businesses for a full overview of how Fundlet works.

Fundlet

Beautiful branded fundraisers for Shopify stores. Built and supported by Matthew Smith.
